dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • Starting dose: 15 mg once daily; may increase up to maximum recommended dose of 45 mg once daily. ( 2.1 ) • Administer orally once daily, preferably in the evening prior to sleep. ( 2.1 ) • Reduce dose gradually when discontinuing mirtazapine tablets. ( 2.6 , 5.13 ) 2.1 Recommended Dosage The recommended starting dose of mirtazapine tablets is 15 mg once daily, administered orally, preferably in the evening prior to sleep.
